---
title: "Figure 5 – AGTR1+ dopaminergic neuron vulnerability"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(png)

pA <- VlnPlot(seurat_obj,
              features=dopamine_genes,
              group.by="DaN_subtype") +
      ggtitle("A")
pA

pB <- VlnPlot(seurat_obj,
              features=raas_genes,
              group.by="DaN_subtype") +
      ggtitle("B")
pB

imgC <- rasterGrob(readPNG("figures/raw_images/iPSC_DaN_AGTR1.png"))
grid.draw(imgC)

pD <- ggplot(pseudotime_df,
             aes(pseudotime)) +
      geom_density() +
      ggtitle("D")
pD

pE <- ggplot(go_ppi,
             aes(term, logp,
                 size=logp,
                 color=interval)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      ggtitle("E")
pE
